PRODUCTION_DEPLOYMENT_AUDIT.vercelConfigSummary: No vercel.json in repo. Root package.json build targets apps/web only. .vercel/project.json links to 8fold-api. Each Vercel project (api.8fold.app, 8fold.app) must have Root Directory configured in dashboard (apps/api, apps/web).
PRODUCTION_DEPLOYMENT_AUDIT.suspectedFailureLayer: apps/api route handler or upstream (jobPublicRepo.drizzle listNewestJobs). Web route is a proxy; 8fold.app 500 is a consequence of api.8fold.app 500. Root cause likely: schema resolution (public vs 8fold_test), Job table/column mismatch, or status enum filter (ASSIGNED/CUSTOMER_APPROVED) not matching production data. Schema lock (#34) enforces ?schema=public at boot but runtime diagnostics were removed in #32, so headers cannot confirm schema at request time.
